recommendations.title: Bruce Lee, My Brother
recommendations.overview: An action-dramatic biopic of the eponymous martial arts legend as told by his younger brother, Robert Lee. It revolves around Bruce Lee's life as a rebellious adolescent in Hong Kong before he sets off for the USA and conquers the world at the age of
recommendations.director: Manfred Wong Man-Chun, Raymond Yip Wai-Man

recommendations.title: The Big Brawl
recommendations.overview: A young Asian American martial artist is forced to participate in a brutal formal street-fight competition.

recommendations.title: Big Fish & Begonia
recommendations.overview: Beyond the human realm, there is a magical race of beings who control the tides and the changing of the seasons. One of these beings, a young girl named Chun, seeks something more—she wants to experience the human world! At sixteen, she finally gets

recommendations.title: Fist of Fury
recommendations.overview: During the Japanese occupation of Shanghai, Chen Zhen, the star pupil of a recently-deceased martial arts teacher battles a Japanese dojo which seeks the demise of his fighting school.

recommendations.title: Enter the Dragon
recommendations.overview: A martial artist agrees to spy on a reclusive crime lord using his invitation to a tournament there as cover.

recommendations.title: Mourning Grave
recommendations.overview: A boy who can see ghosts moves to a small town, where he befriends a female ghost. The two work together to investigate a masked ghost who is murdering students one by one.

recommendations.title: Five Fingers of Death

recommendations.title: Ip Man
recommendations.overview: A semi-biographical account of Yip Man, the first martial arts master to teach the Chinese martial art of Wing Chun. The film focuses on events surrounding Ip that took place in the city of Foshan between the 1930s to 1940s during the Second Sino-Jap

recommendations.title: Officer Black Belt
recommendations.overview: A talented martial artist who can't walk past a person in need unites with a probation officer to fight and prevent crime as a martial arts officer.

recommendations.title: Game of Death
recommendations.overview: A martial arts movie star must fake his death to find the people who are trying to kill him.
